plan.segment_label: Mid-Market accounts with declining reporting/adoption usage and renewals within 90 days
plan.root_cause_hypothesis: All three accounts show a consistent 3-week decline in active and power-users (A001: 106→82, A010: 104→87, A014: 99→87) concentrated in the reporting/dashboard and mobile surfaces. Open tickets corroborate a data-freshness or data-trust issue: A001-T010 reports dashboard exports missing recent data, A010-T004 has a power user questioning a usage dashboard drop, and A014-T003 reports a mobile onboarding blocker. Combined with falling NPS (6, 5, 3) and declining health scores, the evidence points to product reliability gaps in reporting exports and mobile onboarding eroding power-user confidence — not a generic engagement problem. With renewals 22–80 days out, this is a trust-recovery situation, not an awareness one.

intervention_plan.action: Launch a 'Reporting & Mobile Reliability Recovery' play: (1) Product/Eng triage and hotfix the dashboard export data-lag (T010) and mobile onboarding bug (T003) within 5 business days; (2) CSM-led executive call with each account walking through the root cause, the fix timeline, and a tailored re-adoption plan focused on the reporting module and mobile onboarding; (3) deliver a 1:1 power-user enablement session to rebuild reporting trust and re-engage the 10–13 power-users each account has lost.

plan.success_metric: Restore weekly active users to ≥100 and power-users to ≥35 per account (baseline from 2026-04-10) and close all three flagged tickets (T010, T004, T003) with confirmed customer sign-off, while lifting health score by ≥10 points per account
plan.fallback_if_intervention_fails: Escalate A014 (renewal 2026-05-20) to VP Customer Success and Account Executive for a renewal-protection plan including a short-term contract extension or credit; for A001 and A010, trigger executive sponsor outreach and a Product GM review to negotiate a remediation commitment ahead of their July renewals.
